Implementation note: logit(p)=intercept+sum beta_j*z_j; p=1/(1+exp[-logit(p)]). z_j=(design term_j-mean_j)/SD_j after spline-basis construction.
Estimated by fitting observed in-hospital death on the logit of predicted risk; intercept=0 and slope=1 indicate ideal calibration.
Glucose 10-1000 mg/dL; creatinine 0.1-30 mg/dL; BUN 1-300 mg/dL; WBC 0.1-500 x 10^9/L. Values outside these ranges were treated as invalid.
Peak-aligned comparator with four separate high-threshold indicators: glucose >=180 mg/dL, creatinine >=1.5 mg/dL, BUN >=30 mg/dL, and WBC >12 x 10^9/L.
Fixed L2 penalty lambda=1.0 applied to non-intercept coefficients for numerical stability; not tuned using temporal-validation or eICU data.
Implemented in scripts/run_eicu_external_validation.py using rcs_basis, standardize_apply, fit_logistic_irls, and predict_logistic.
